description_long: This is a stylized anthropomorphic doll with a large, rounded head, long floppy ears, and a small tail, resembling a cartoon rabbit. The doll is dressed in a black t-shirt with yellow writing, green shorts, and mismatched footwear: one black and one white slide sandal, both with socks. The face features large, half-closed eyes, a small nose, and a subtle, neutral mouth, giving it a relaxed or sleepy expression. Pink bows adorn the top of each ear, adding a playful touch to the overall appearance. The limbs are slender and elongated, with simple, minimalistic hands and feet. The surface appears smooth and matte, typical of vinyl or soft plastic dolls, and the overall build suggests a lightweight, hollow construction.
description: A cartoonish rabbit doll with a large head, floppy ears, pink bows, black t-shirt, green shorts, and mismatched slide sandals. The doll has a relaxed facial expression and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, black t-shirt with yellow writing, green shorts, and both slide sandals clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, single visible pink bow, long ear, and the tail protruding from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both ears, the tail, and the back of the t-shirt and shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, pink bow, ear, and the side of the face and body.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual streetwear style with a black graphic t-shirt featuring yellow text, green shorts, and mismatched slide sandals (one black, one white) worn with socks. Pink bows on the ears add a playful accessory.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso upright. The posture is static and neutral.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with half-closed eyes, a small closed mouth, and relaxed facial features.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; long beige rabbit ears with pink bows on top.
